prompt: Create an ultra-realistic modern gallery wall mockup in a luxury interior, vertical 4:5 composition. Show a smooth matte off-white wall with exactly three framed portrait photographs arranged horizontally in a straight row with equal spacing. Each frame is portrait-oriented, slim black metal or wood frame, white mat border, glass front with subtle reflections, and realistic shadows. The three framed photos show the same young Black man in three different professional portrait styles: left frame shows a front-facing head-and-shoulders portrait wearing a blue and gold patterned African print shirt; center frame shows him looking downward while adjusting his cuff or watch, wearing a royal blue traditional-style shirt with glasses and a pocket square; right frame shows a formal front-facing business portrait wearing a navy suit, white shirt, navy tie, tie bar, and white pocket square. Place one long, thin black picture light centered above the frames, casting a warm soft glow across the wall and the top edges of the frames. Include a blurred green indoor plant in the lower left foreground, a dark modern wooden sideboard cabinet in the lower right, a simple white baseboard, and a gray stone or polished concrete floor. Lighting should be warm, high-end, calm, and gallery-like, with soft natural shadows and shallow depth of field in the foreground. No text, no logos, no watermark, no extra frames, keep exactly three portraits.
promptEn: Create an ultra-realistic modern gallery wall mockup in a luxury interior, vertical 4:5 composition. Show a smooth matte off-white wall with exactly three framed portrait photographs arranged horizontally in a straight row with equal spacing. Each frame is portrait-oriented, slim black metal or wood frame, white mat border, glass front with subtle reflections, and realistic shadows. The three framed photos show the same young Black man in three different professional portrait styles: left frame shows a front-facing head-and-shoulders portrait wearing a blue and gold patterned African print shirt; center frame shows him looking downward while adjusting his cuff or watch, wearing a royal blue traditional-style shirt with glasses and a pocket square; right frame shows a formal front-facing business portrait wearing a navy suit, white shirt, navy tie, tie bar, and white pocket square. Place one long, thin black picture light centered above the frames, casting a warm soft glow across the wall and the top edges of the frames. Include a blurred green indoor plant in the lower left foreground, a dark modern wooden sideboard cabinet in the lower right, a simple white baseboard, and a gray stone or polished concrete floor. No text, no logos, no watermark, no extra frames, keep exactly three portraits.
promptZh: 创建一个超逼真的现代画廊墙样机，置于奢华室内环境中，采用 4:5 竖构图。展示一面平滑的哑光灰白色墙壁，墙上水平排列着三幅装裱好的肖像照片，间距相等。每幅画框均为竖向，采用纤细的黑色金属或木质边框、白色卡纸边衬，玻璃表面带有细腻的反光和逼真的阴影。这三幅装裱照片展示了同一个 年轻黑人男性 在三种不同的专业肖像风格中：左侧画框展示了一张正面头部和肩部肖像，身穿 蓝金图案非洲印花衬衫；中间画框展示了他低头调整袖口或手表的样子，身穿 宝蓝色传统风格衬衫，佩戴眼镜和口袋巾；右侧画框展示了一张正式的正面商务肖像，身穿 海军蓝西装、白衬衫、海军蓝领带、领带夹和白色口袋巾。在画框上方居中位置放置一盏细长的黑色画灯，将温暖柔和的光芒投射在墙面和画框顶部边缘。前景左下方包含一株模糊的室内绿植，右下方放置一个深色现代木质边柜，配有简约的白色踢脚线和灰色石材或抛光混凝土材质地面。灯光应呈现温暖、高端、宁静的画廊氛围，具有柔和的自然阴影和前景浅景深效果。无文字、无 Logo、无水印、无额外画框，严格保持三幅肖像。
